final:
module top_module(input signed [15:0] SignImm,
					 input signed [15:0] PCPlus1,
					 output signed [15:0] PCBranch);assign PCBranch = SignImm + PCPlus1;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (1'b1) begin
        SignImm <= -SignImm;
        PCPlus1 <= -PCPlus1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
